records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: Newbie yard trash; rats bats snakes bears. Safe with guards nearby.
records.tips: Stay close to city gates. Kill everything that moves. Sell pelts/fangs to vendor.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: Polar bear cubs gnolls near Halas. Decent starter area.
records.tips: Stick close to Halas guards. Gnoll fangs are a quest turn-in.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: Wall area has goblins orcs bixies. Very safe newbie zone.
records.tips: Turn in Crushbone belts for XP/faction if available. Great halfling quests.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: HUGE ZEM of 160! Undead dungeon under Qeynos. Fastest XP for this level range on Antonica.
records.tips: Bone chips drop frequently - save for turn-ins. Watch for trains from deeper levels.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: Move further from Halas to fight higher level gnolls and ice goblins.
records.tips: Work toward Blackburrow entrance at south end of zone.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: Wall area goblins are levels 5-10. Good consistent XP.
records.tips: Group with other halflings. Goblin drops sell decently.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 100. Classic dungeon with gnolls. Great social grouping dungeon.
records.tips: Gnoll fangs quest turn-in for Qeynos faction. Watch for trains! Bridge is dangerous. Snake pit has named spawns.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: Bandits near the hills give decent XP and drop coin.
records.tips: Good for solo players who can't find Blackburrow groups.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: Dervish camps and undead. Alternative to Blackburrow if you travel east.
records.tips: Dervish camps are great for groups. Undead for solo casters.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 130! One of the BEST group dungeons for this range. Worth the boat ride.
records.tips: Take boat from Qeynos to Erudin then to Butcherblock or go overland. Groups form constantly here.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: Open field zone. Griffons bandits and gorge guards. Good for kiters.
records.tips: Gorge of King Xorbb entrance has minotaurs. Caster kiting works well in open fields.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: Wide open plains. Aviaks lions spiders. Great for kiting classes.
records.tips: South Karana aviaks are levels 15-25. Good kiting if you have SoW.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 80. Gnolls and orcs in the pass. Decent dungeon-crawl feel.
records.tips: Can be dangerous with high level guards if you have bad faction.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 90. Goblin-heavy dungeon. Good for Barbarians already in Everfrost.
records.tips: Ice goblin drops are decent. Named goblins drop upgrades.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 150! Goblins in basement give amazing XP due to high ZEM.
records.tips: Basement is the sweet spot. Guards upstairs are much higher level.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 130! Great dungeon near Lavastorm. Good drops and XP.
records.tips: Accessible from Lavastorm. Named drops include decent caster gear.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: Hill Giants drop 5-10pp each kill. Best raw platinum farming in Classic.
records.tips: Very crowded on TLP servers. Compete for spawns. Giants hit hard - bring a group or be well-geared.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: Aviak village. Great for kiting classes (Druid/Wizard/Necro).
records.tips: Aviak Avocets and Rooks for mid-20s. Aviak Egrets for low 30s.

records.section: ANTONICA WEST (Barbarian / Halfling / Human-Qeynos / Half Elf-Qeynos)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 90. Vampire-themed dungeon in Lesser Faydark. Good for boxers.
records.tips: Front yard is soloable. Deeper areas need groups. Great loot.

records.section: FAYDWER (Dwarf / Gnome / High Elf / Wood Elf / Half Elf-Fay)
records.why_its_good: Newbie yard outside Kelethin/Felwithe. Bats decaying skeletons orc pawns.
records.tips: Stay near lifts. Orc Hill has quest mobs. Sell bat wings and bone chips.
records.races_best_for: Wood Elf / High Elf / Half Elf

records.section: FAYDWER (Dwarf / Gnome / High Elf / Wood Elf / Half Elf-Fay)
records.why_its_good: Open zone near Kaladim. Skeletons goblins aqua goblins at low levels.
records.tips: Chess piece island has low level undead. Safe with dwarf guards nearby.

records.section: FAYDWER (Dwarf / Gnome / High Elf / Wood Elf / Half Elf-Fay)
records.why_its_good: Clockwork mobs and kobolds near Ak'Anon. Unique gnome starting experience.
records.tips: Minotaur caves are higher level - avoid early. Clockwork parts sell to vendors.

records.section: FAYDWER (Dwarf / Gnome / High Elf / Wood Elf / Half Elf-Fay)
records.why_its_good: Orc camps near Crushbone zone line. Social orc camps for groups.
records.tips: Orc scalps and Crushbone belts for faction turn-ins. Great for early grouping.
records.races_best_for: Wood Elf / High Elf / Half Elf

records.section: FAYDWER (Dwarf / Gnome / High Elf / Wood Elf / Half Elf-Fay)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 160! THE premier Faydwer dungeon. Absolutely packed with groups on TLP.
records.tips: Emperor Crush and Ambassador DVinn are named bosses. Crushbone belts for Kaladim/Felwithe faction. Best XP/hour for this range.

records.section: FAYDWER (Dwarf / Gnome / High Elf / Wood Elf / Half Elf-Fay)
records.why_its_good: Undead near chessboard. Alternative if Crushbone is too crowded.
records.tips: Skeleton drops include bone chips for turn-ins.

records.section: FAYDWER (Dwarf / Gnome / High Elf / Wood Elf / Half Elf-Fay)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 100. Goblin dungeon in Misty Thicket. Less crowded alternative to Crushbone.
records.tips: Stay near zone line for safety. Wandering goblins can train you.

records.section: FAYDWER (Dwarf / Gnome / High Elf / Wood Elf / Half Elf-Fay)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 130! Estate of Unrest. THE top dungeon for Faydwer 15-25. Groups always forming.
records.tips: Yard trash 15-18. Basement 20-25. Fireplace room is a classic camp. Hag/undead drop decent loot.

records.section: FAYDWER (Dwarf / Gnome / High Elf / Wood Elf / Half Elf-Fay)
records.why_its_good: Gargoyles and skeletons on an island. Gargoyle Eyes vendor for 8-10pp each.
records.tips: Take boat from Butcherblock. Skeletons and gargoyles fight each other. Kill skeletons first to spawn gargoyles.

records.section: FAYDWER (Dwarf / Gnome / High Elf / Wood Elf / Half Elf-Fay)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 90. Vampire dungeon. Front yard soloable. Deeper areas need groups.
records.tips: Great profit potential. Be careful past the graveyard - difficulty spikes hard.

records.section: FAYDWER (Dwarf / Gnome / High Elf / Wood Elf / Half Elf-Fay)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 150! Froglok dungeon. Excellent group XP. One of the best ZEMs for this range.
records.tips: Named frogloks drop valuable items. Deep camp requires swim. Very social mobs.

records.why_its_good: Forest outside Erudin. Kobolds and skeletons roam. Very dark zone.
records.tips: Kill every decaying skeleton and kobold runt - they drop weapons and cloth armor.

records.why_its_good: Two kobold camps provide great XP for levels 5-7. Easily soloable.
records.tips: Camp one set of kobolds. Quick respawn timer. Good for caster classes.

records.why_its_good: Island zone between Erudin and Qeynos. Snakes at first then bats and willowisps.
records.tips: Willowisps drop Greater Lightstones (vendor for good plat). Kerran beach camp good to 18-20.

records.why_its_good: Kerran beach camp. Kerrans are levels 10-18. Stay here until mid-teens.
records.tips: Kerran island is the main leveling spot for Erudites after kobolds.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 90. Small island zone. Kerran warriors and shamans.
records.tips: Accessible from Erud's Crossing. Higher ZEM than mainland Odus zones.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 150! Kobold dungeon on Odus. AMAZING ZEM. Often overlooked.
records.tips: If you can find a group here the XP is incredible due to 150 ZEM. Paineel entrance.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 130! Worth traveling to Faydwer for this dungeon. Best groups in game.
records.tips: Take boat from Erudin to Butcherblock. Or go to Qeynos and boat to Faydwer.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 100. High-level dungeon on Odus. Front entrance elementals for 20s-30s.
records.tips: Entrance area is manageable. Deeper requires higher levels. Excellent drops.

records.why_its_good: Newbie yard area. Rats bats snakes near city gates.
records.tips: Sell drops to vendors inside Freeport. Stay near guards.

records.why_its_good: Animals near WFreeport zone line for solo. Orc/Dervish camps for groups.
records.tips: Deathfist Slashed Belts quest turn-in for Freeport faction and XP. Great early quest.

records.why_its_good: Dervish camps and orc camps in the middle of the zone. Good group XP.
records.tips: Groups form at these camps regularly on TLP. Good plat drops.

records.why_its_good: Desert zone south of Freeport. Dervish camps and undead.
records.tips: Madman Mage camp is a famous spot. Sand giants roam - avoid them!

records.why_its_good: ZEM 160! Undead dungeon south of Freeport. INCREDIBLE ZEM - one of the highest in Classic.
records.tips: Overlooked dungeon with amazing XP due to 160 ZEM. Three floors of undead. Named drop decent gear.

records.why_its_good: Crocodiles specters and orcs. Open desert zone.
records.tips: Orc Highway camp is a classic spot. Spectres for caster soloers at higher end.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 130! Dungeon near Lavastorm. Excellent XP and drops.
records.tips: Named bosses drop decent gear. Multiple camp spots. Worth the travel.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 130! Lavastorm dungeon. Fire goblins and gnomes.
records.tips: Clock gnomes and fire goblins. Multiple levels. Good for groups.

records.why_its_good: Dark Elf starting area. Skeletons and bears near Neriak entrance.
records.tips: Very dark zone. Bring a light source or use Ultravision. Kill everything.

records.why_its_good: Troll starting area near Grobb. Frogloks and mosquitoes.
records.tips: Froglok drops are decent. Very wet zone - bring levitate later.

records.why_its_good: Ogre starting area near Oggok. Lizardmen and basilisks.
records.tips: Lizardman camps provide early grouping. Basilisks are tougher.

records.why_its_good: Higher level undead and bears further from Neriak.
records.tips: Progress toward East Commonlands zone line for higher mobs.

records.why_its_good: Froglok camps deeper in swamp. Tae Ew lizardmen.
records.tips: Group at froglok camps. Decent drops and consistent spawns.

records.why_its_good: Lizardman camps provide grouped XP.
records.tips: Watch for higher level roaming spectres. Stick to lizard camps.

records.why_its_good: Travel east from Nektulos. Orc and Dervish camps.
records.tips: Evil races can hunt here but watch Freeport guard faction.

records.why_its_good: Desert south of Commonlands. Dervish and undead camps.
records.tips: Undead camps are good for evil races - no faction issues with undead.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 150! Froglok dungeon accessible from Innothule. Excellent ZEM.
records.tips: Trolls can walk right in from their starting area. Amazing XP.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 160! Undead dungeon. Evil races welcome. Highest ZEM dungeon for this range.
records.tips: Three floors of undead. Named drops. Incredible XP rate due to ZEM.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 130. Dungeon near Lavastorm. Good for evil-aligned characters.
records.tips: No faction issues. Good drops. Multiple camp spots.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 130. Worth traveling to Faydwer. Best groups for this level range.
records.tips: Even evil races can group here - dungeon mobs don't check faction.

records.why_its_good: Continuation from Upper Guk. Named frogloks drop excellent loot.
records.tips: Ghoul Lord camp / Mithril Runed Tunic camp are classic. Need swim skill.

records.why_its_good: Temple of Cazic-Thule. Lizardmen and undead. Evil-friendly zone.
records.tips: Evil races have good faction here. Multiple camp spots at different levels.

records.why_its_good: Iksar starting area. XP is PHENOMENAL. Best newbie zone in the game.
records.tips: Kill yard trash near Cabilis. Curscale Armor quests for free equipment. Max your skills every level.

records.why_its_good: The Pit east of Cabilis path. Higher level mobs. Incredible XP rate.
records.tips: Learn kick at 5. Spider caves west toward Warsliks Woods work for 4-6. Accumulate plat for spells.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 150! Undead tower. AMAZING experience bonus. One of the best leveling spots in game.
records.tips: Enter at level 8-9. Kill lobby skeletons. Progress upstairs as you level. You'll easily reach 18-19 here.

records.why_its_good: Large zone south of Cabilis. Despite LOW ZEM of 60 the mob density makes up for it.
records.tips: Windmill area for early teens. Progress to Sarnak fort for groups. Kiting works well.

records.why_its_good: Accessible from FoB. Vendor available. Mobs give 2-3% per kill.
records.tips: Safe solo pulling location. Use PoK book if available to get here fast.

records.why_its_good: Giant fort area. Easy single pulls. Good progression from Kurn's Tower.
records.tips: Solo-friendly. Giants drop decent loot. Progress to Dalnir entrance.

records.why_its_good: Sarnak fort for grouped content. Multiple camps.
records.tips: Despite low ZEM the density and grouping make this worthwhile.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 95. AMAZING ZEM for Kunark. Antisocial mobs = safe pulls.
records.tips: Lower 30s mobs at entrance progressively harder deeper. One of the best Kunark dungeons for XP.

records.why_its_good: Open field near Karnor's Castle. Level 10 spread of mobs. Easy pulling.
records.tips: Great for kiters. Karnor's Castle entrance has grouping. Watch for wandering dragons!

records.why_its_good: Giant fort in zone center. Excellent loot. Open field hunting.
records.tips: Levitation recommended for terrain. Multiple camps for different levels.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. Simply amazing for both boxers and groupers. Big zone with plenty of room.
records.tips: Ornate Rune Shield and Slimy Green Ring are valuable drops. Multiple camp options.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. Dungeon crawl. Mobs commonly drop raw plat. Fairly good ZEM.
records.tips: Group dungeon with multiple wings. Good loot table. Compensates for difficulty with plat drops.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. THE endgame Kunark dungeon. Some of the best XP in the entire game.
records.tips: Right wing for lower groups. Left wing similar. Crypt always camped (needs Bard/Rogue). Juggs make you rich. Myconid area for 55+.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. Enormous dungeon. Entrance is light blue at 60.
records.tips: Fancy Velvet Mantle and Girdle of Flayed Iksar drop in light blue section. Incarnadine gear in harder areas.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. Named spawns random throughout wings. Zone-wide rare items.
records.tips: Enshrouded Veil Golden Bracer Stein of Tears Melodious Truncheon are zone-wide rares. South wing most profitable.

records.why_its_good: Wide open for kiters. Hotspot for levels 50-54.
records.tips: Great for kiting classes. Decent XP in open field.

records.why_its_good: Pit under Shar Vahl. Rockhoppers skeletons grimlings scorpions. Mobs cap around level 4.
records.tips: Use /con to gauge difficulty. Citizenship quests give bonus XP. Complete pit quests before leaving.

records.why_its_good: Hunt near Shar Vahl zone line. Lesser shades and skeletal hunters in NE corner at level 5+.
records.tips: Lesser shades good to grind until 8-10 when they go light blue. Logical first zone after the pit.

records.why_its_good: Rockhoppers and rhinobeetles level 10-14. Drops include pelts and Vah Shir quest items.
records.tips: Much tougher than Shadeweaver's - don't come before 10. West side is safer. Hollowshade War event can change spawns.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 160! THE BEST grouped leveling zone in Luclin. Insane XP modifier.
records.tips: Skip Hollowshade and come here at 8-10 for fastest leveling. Bandit camps 15-25 are always packed with groups. Three entrances with increasing difficulty. Fungal fiends cast Creeping Crud DoT - bring Cure Disease.
records.races_best_for: Vah Shir (and ALL races in Luclin)

records.why_its_good: Bandit camps in main cavern. The most grouped location in Luclin at these levels.
records.tips: Shadowhaven entrance is the main way in. Several groups can fit around the bandit camps.

records.why_its_good: Hill camp pulling greyhoppers zelniaks and stonegrabbers.
records.tips: Greyhopper hides good for tailoring. Reached through Netherbian Lair.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 80. Needlite cavern. Excellent for casters with weak gear.
records.tips: Very fast but slight hits raise defense skills rapidly. Good solo caster spot.

records.why_its_good: The most admired mid-range zone in Luclin. Multiple discrete camps.
records.tips: Various pull locations from Netherbian Lair Grieg's End Sanctus Seru Maiden's Eye. Multiple level ranges of mobs.

records.why_its_good: Gargoyle Eyes sell for 8-10pp. Cyclops start around level 35. Ancient Cyclops drops Jboots ring.
records.tips: OoT is the great equalizer - everyone ends up here. Boat from BB or Freeport.

records.why_its_good: Best raw platinum farm in Classic. Hill Giants drop 5-10pp.
records.tips: Very crowded on TLP. Bring a group. Good plat to fund gear upgrades.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 95. Amazing ZEM. Antisocial mobs mean safe pulls. Best Kunark dungeon XP.
records.tips: Lower 30s at entrance. Progressively harder deeper.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 150! Goblins in basement. One of the highest ZEMs in Classic.
records.tips: Basement is the sweet spot. Amazing XP per hour.

records.why_its_good: Named froglok camps. Classic EQ camping experience. Great loot.
records.tips: Bedroom camp. Mithril camp. Ghoul Lord. Learn the camp system.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 130! Fire goblins and clockwork gnomes.
records.tips: Multiple levels to dungeon. Good plat drops.

records.why_its_good: Famous ramp grouping spot. Abundant mob spawns.
records.tips: South side ramp. Evil guards patrol at night - be careful.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. Simply amazing for boxers and groupers. Big zone.
records.tips: Ornate Rune Shield and Slimy Green Ring are valuable. Multiple camp options.

records.why_its_good: Possibly the favorite camp in all Classic. Best raw plat per hour.
records.tips: Ancient Cyclops drops Ring of the Ancients (Jboots quest). Captain Surestout on upper islands.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. Velious dungeon. Orcs and deeper dungeon content.
records.tips: Onsite merchants and banking. Broken bridge room area is popular.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. Multi-floor Velious dungeon requiring keys.
records.tips: Keys drop from mobs on each floor. Progress upward. Good XP and loot.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. Dungeon crawl. Mobs drop raw plat. Good ZEM.
records.tips: Multiple wings. Raw plat drops compensate for difficulty.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 80. Classic endgame dungeon. Varied mob levels.
records.tips: Efreeti Lord Djarn is endgame camp. Multiple floor levels.

records.why_its_good: Deep named camps. Live-side and dead-side.
records.tips: FBSS (Flowing Black Silk Sash) is one of most desired items in game.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 100. Scalable difficulty. Elementals and golems.
records.tips: Docks and Undead Tower progressions. Loam Encrusted Gear drops. Idol of the Underking quest.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. THE endgame dungeon. Best XP in Kunark. Juggs make you rich.
records.tips: Right wing for lower. Crypt always camped. Myconid area for 55+. Plan to spend many levels here.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. Velious dungeon. Icepaw mobs drop Spider Fur items.
records.tips: Nothing tops Velketor's for XP at 55-60 according to many players. Quest gem drops are valuable.

records.why_its_good: Deep Sebilis. Juggernauts and Trakanon area. Best XP to 60.
records.tips: Juggs are incredibly profitable. Disco wings and jail area for high 50s.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. Enormous dungeon. Incarnadine gear drops.
records.tips: Entrance light blue at 60. Vibrating Gauntlets of Infuse in harder section.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. Velious endgame. Frost giants. Flexible group sizes.
records.tips: Top tier zone for XP and loot. Requires decent gear to survive.

records.why_its_good: Wide open for kiters. Hotspot levels 50-54.
records.tips: Best outdoor kiting zone in Kunark. Good for Druids/Wizards/Necros.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. Zone-wide rare items. South wing most profitable.
records.tips: Enshrouded Veil Golden Bracer Stein of Tears are zone-wide rares.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. Velious. Good to be left alone - less camped than Seb/KC.
records.tips: Phase spiders and Vilefang. Requires good gear. Chetari camps.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 85. Velious dungeon. Fellspine camp is the best camp in zone.
records.tips: Zone-wide ink drops are valuable. Quest gems vendor for good plat.

records.why_its_good: ZEM 80. Solo dragons drop Kunark spell scrolls (potentially very valuable).
records.tips: Kiting classes can solo dragons here. Spell drops can be worth thousands.

records.section: LUCLIN ERA LEVELING PATH (All Races 1-60 with Luclin unlocked)
records.why_its_good: Standard starting area for your race. See race-specific sections above.
records.tips: Get through these fast. Goal is to get to Paludal Caverns ASAP.

records.section: LUCLIN ERA LEVELING PATH (All Races 1-60 with Luclin unlocked)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 160! THE Luclin leveling zone. Insane XP. Always groups forming.
records.tips: Three entrances: Shadeweaver's (low level) Shadowhaven (mid) Hollowshade (high). Bandit camps 15-25 are the sweet spot. Fungal fiends DoT - bring Cure Disease.

records.section: LUCLIN ERA LEVELING PATH (All Races 1-60 with Luclin unlocked)
records.why_its_good: Hill camp. Greyhoppers zelniaks stonegrabbers.
records.tips: Greyhopper hides for tailoring. Less crowded alternative.

records.section: LUCLIN ERA LEVELING PATH (All Races 1-60 with Luclin unlocked)
records.why_its_good: Needlite cavern. Fast hits raise defense skills.
records.tips: Excellent for casters with weak gear. Good solo spot.

records.section: LUCLIN ERA LEVELING PATH (All Races 1-60 with Luclin unlocked)
records.why_its_good: Most admired mid-range Luclin zone. Multiple camps.
records.tips: Various pull locations. Multiple level ranges of mobs throughout zone.

records.section: LUCLIN ERA LEVELING PATH (All Races 1-60 with Luclin unlocked)
records.why_its_good: Best dungeon for this range regardless of expansion.
records.tips: Still the go-to for mid-30s to mid-40s even with Luclin available.

records.section: LUCLIN ERA LEVELING PATH (All Races 1-60 with Luclin unlocked)
records.why_its_good: Gnome camps underbulks fungal fiends stonegrabbers.
records.tips: Reached via short side of Shadowhaven. Taskmaster Torkazh drops enduring breath quest items.

records.section: LUCLIN ERA LEVELING PATH (All Races 1-60 with Luclin unlocked)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 90. Probably the best zone added in Luclin! Phenomenal XP.
records.tips: Castle section is the sweet spot. At 63 you get over 1% AA per kill in full group.

records.section: LUCLIN ERA LEVELING PATH (All Races 1-60 with Luclin unlocked)
records.why_its_good: Still amazing even with Luclin zones available.
records.tips: Juggs still one of the most profitable camps in game.

records.section: LUCLIN ERA LEVELING PATH (All Races 1-60 with Luclin unlocked)
records.why_its_good: Most popular Luclin endgame leveling zone. Multiple discrete camps.
records.tips: Camps: shik'nar shadel bandits tarmoks shrooms lotuses. Bandits and shik'nar have highest XP. The Caller quest has fast infinite spawns.

records.section: LUCLIN ERA LEVELING PATH (All Races 1-60 with Luclin unlocked)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 90. One of the best zones in Luclin for XP AND loot.
records.tips: Mobs hit very hard with tons of HP. NOT for undergeared players. NO DROP armor on par with Classic Planar Gear. Luclin spells drop here.

records.section: LUCLIN ERA LEVELING PATH (All Races 1-60 with Luclin unlocked)
records.why_its_good: ZEM 90. Named spawns in radius zones not fixed locations.
records.tips: Frequent player activity. Dungeon crawl feel. Good vendor trash.

records.section: LUCLIN ERA LEVELING PATH (All Races 1-60 with Luclin unlocked)
records.why_its_good: Alternative endgame zone. Good for soloers.
records.tips: Less crowded than Fungus Grove or Umbral Plains.

records.section: LUCLIN ERA LEVELING PATH (All Races 1-60 with Luclin unlocked)
records.why_its_good: Dungeon for well-geared groups. Challenging content.
records.tips: Requires good gear and AAs. Not for casual groups.

records.why_its_good: Why It's Good for AA
records.tips: Tips

records.why_its_good: Over 1% AA per kill in full group at 63. Best AA/hour ratio.
records.tips: Castle section only. Lower areas not worth it at 60.

records.why_its_good: Best location for both XP AND loot. Armor drops on par with Planar Gear.
records.tips: Mobs hit VERY hard. Need good gear and AAs to start. Not for undergeared.

records.why_its_good: Highest XP of the Fungus Grove camps. Fast respawn. Multiple group spots.
records.tips: Bandits and shik'nar camps are the best. Caller quest for infinite spawns.

records.why_its_good: Good ZEM of 90. Consistent XP. Named spawns randomly.
records.tips: Named loot is a nice bonus. Good for steady AA grinding.

records.why_its_good: Fellspine camp. Zone-wide ink drops are valuable. Good XP and plat.
records.tips: Velious quest gems sell well. Profitable AA grinding.

records.why_its_good: Still great XP. Juggs are incredibly profitable. Less competition with Luclin open.
records.tips: Lower floors and Trakanon area. Minimal competition now.

records.why_its_good: Good location if you want to be left alone. Less crowded.
records.tips: Tough for undergeared or small groups. Full group recommended.

records.why_its_good: Upgraded in late Luclin for level 60 content. Bandits and shik'nar camps highest XP.
records.tips: Multiple camp options. Good for variety.

records.why_its_good: Still viable for AA. Good faction hits for Velious quests.
records.tips: Combine AA grinding with Velious faction work.

records.why_its_good: Arguably best dungeon crawl location for this range.
records.tips: Multi-floor progression. Keys required.

records.why_its_good: Level Range
records.tips: Play Style
Solo/Group/Kite
records.races_best_for: ZEM 145! One of the first PoP zones accessible. Root rot or kite. Single pulls. GREAT for early PoP leveling.

records.tips: Solo/Kite
records.races_best_for: ZEM 145! Pull mobs to PoTranquility zone line for safe kiting. No flagging needed.

records.tips: Group
records.races_best_for: ZEM 119. Good alternative if can't find groups elsewhere. Clockwork mobs.

records.tips: Group
records.races_best_for: ZEM 145. Trials of Justice for flagging progression. Good XP.

records.tips: Group
records.races_best_for: ZEM 145. Good field zone. Multiple camp spots.

records.tips: Group/Solo
records.races_best_for: ZEM 170! HIGHEST ZEM IN ALL OF PoP. Giants and wolves. Incredible XP if you can handle the mobs.

records.tips: Group
records.races_best_for: ZEM 145. Agony and torment themed. Good dungeon crawl.

records.tips: Group
records.races_best_for: ZEM 145. Clear 2nd tier zone. Excellent XP once flagged.

records.tips: Group
records.races_best_for: ZEM 119. Good for 57-65 range. Tier 2 difficulty.

records.tips: Group/Kite
records.races_best_for: ZEM 130. Great kiting location right at zone in. Iz/Gy area for aggro kiting or root/rotting. Many druids AA here.

records.tips: Group
records.races_best_for: ZEM 145. Huge field area in center. Diaku enemies throughout. Good XP and loot camps.

records.tips: Group
records.races_best_for: ZEM 130. Sol Ro is very nice for grouping at 65. 2-3% AA off guardians. 1-2 ornate drops per hour.

records.tips: Solo/Group
records.races_best_for: ZEM 150! ARGUABLY THE BEST XP ZONE IN ALL OF PoP. Large zone. Kite tables in C2 for solo. C1/C2 for dungeon crawl groups. Near Fennin trigger: 13-15% per kill solo if elemental flagged.

records.tips: Group
records.races_best_for: ZEM 160! Very high ZEM. Requires swim capability.

records.tips: Group
Group
records.races_best_for: ZEM 145. Mud and earth themed. Good consistent XP.

records.section: PoP AA GRINDING RECOMMENDATIONS BY PRIORITY
records.why_its_good: Solo Viable?
records.tips: Tips

records.section: PoP AA GRINDING RECOMMENDATIONS BY PRIORITY
records.play_style: Best overall AA zone. Huge zone. Multiple camps. Guardians give 13-15% per kill solo near Fennin trigger.
records.why_its_good: Yes - kiting around tables
records.tips: Need elemental flagging. Absolutely worth the progression. Best in slot AA grinding.

records.section: PoP AA GRINDING RECOMMENDATIONS BY PRIORITY
records.play_style: Highest ZEM in PoP at 170. Incredible base XP.
records.why_its_good: Limited - mobs hit hard
records.tips: If you can handle the mobs the ZEM alone makes this amazing.

records.section: PoP AA GRINDING RECOMMENDATIONS BY PRIORITY
records.play_style: Great kiting at zone in. Safe and repeatable. No deep flagging needed.
records.why_its_good: Yes - kiting/root rot
records.tips: Most accessible flagged zone for AA. Druids and kiters love this zone.

records.section: PoP AA GRINDING RECOMMENDATIONS BY PRIORITY
records.why_its_good: No - group required
records.tips: Need swim items. Less popular means less competition.

records.section: PoP AA GRINDING RECOMMENDATIONS BY PRIORITY
records.play_style: ZEM 145. Solid consistent AA. Multiple camps.
records.why_its_good: Limited
records.tips: Good for groups. Steady AA income without elemental flags.

records.section: PoP AA GRINDING RECOMMENDATIONS BY PRIORITY
records.play_style: ZEM 145. Field killing Diaku. Good for melee groups.
records.why_its_good: No - group
records.tips: Large open field area. Good for AE groups.

records.section: PoP AA GRINDING RECOMMENDATIONS BY PRIORITY
records.why_its_good: Yes - root rot/kite
records.tips: Best no-flag-required AA zone. Start here before getting flagged.

records.section: PoP AA GRINDING RECOMMENDATIONS BY PRIORITY
records.play_style: ZEM 130. 2-3% AA off guardians at 65. Ornate drops bonus.
records.why_its_good: No - group
records.tips: Nice secondary zone. Ornate drops add gear value to AA sessions.

records.zone: Plane of Disease / Plane of Nightmare
records.play_style: Start PoP here. No flagging needed. ZEM 145 on both. Get familiar with PoP difficulty.
If you can get a group here the XP is unmatched due to ZEM.
Better XP than tier 1 zones. HoH has great kiting spot at zone in.

records.zone: Bastion of Thunder / Crypt of Decay
records.play_style: Work on elemental flag progression while gaining XP.
13-15% per kill solo near Fennin. 2-3% in groups. Best XP in PoP.

records.zone: Plane of Fire / Plane of Water
records.play_style: Push to 65. The XP doubles at 65 compared to lower levels for AA.

records.zone: Plane of Fire (primary) / Halls of Honor (safe)
records.play_style: At 65 XP is twice as fast and half as hard. Grind AA in PoFire forever.

Era
records.tips: Why Get It

records.why_its_good: Era Available
records.tips: Why Get It

records.why_its_good: Luclin
records.tips: Increases avoidance. THE most important AA in the game for all classes. Max this first.

records.why_its_good: Luclin
records.tips: Reduces melee damage taken. Tied with Combat Agility as most important. Max alongside CA.

records.why_its_good: Luclin
records.tips: Increases max HP. More HP = more survivability.

records.why_its_good: Luclin
records.tips: Permanent run speed increase. Quality of life and escape tool.

records.why_its_good: Luclin
records.tips: Increases max mana pool.

records.why_its_good: Luclin
records.tips: Flat mana reduction on spells. Less mana per spell = more sustained DPS/healing.

records.why_its_good: Luclin
records.tips: Extra mana regeneration. Stacks with other regen.

records.why_its_good: Luclin
records.tips: Increases critical heal chance. Essential for healers.

records.why_its_good: Luclin
records.tips: Increases heal amount %. More healing per spell.

records.why_its_good: Luclin
records.tips: Group HoT (Heal over Time). Powerful group healing tool.

records.why_its_good: Luclin
records.tips: Improved stealth. Better sneaking.

records.why_its_good: PoP
records.tips: Sneak/Hide invisible to almost every mob. Game-changing.

records.why_its_good: Luclin
records.tips: Improves LoH from ~3k to 10000+. Massive upgrade.

records.why_its_good: PoP
records.tips: Buff entire group at once. Huge quality of life.

records.why_its_good: Luclin
records.tips: Emergency evacuation. Saves wipes.

records.why_its_good: Luclin
records.tips: AE cure diseases/poisons. Very useful in Luclin zones.

records.why_its_good: PoP
records.tips: Increases mitigation. Essential for tanks.

records.why_its_good: Luclin
records.tips: Increases proc rate on weapons.

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.why_its_good: Mid Path (15-30)
records.tips: Late Path (30-60)

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.why_its_good: Mid Path (15-30)
records.tips: Late Path (30-60)

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.why_its_good: Unrest 15-25 (boat to Faydwer) or Qeynos Catacombs
records.tips: Universal path from 30+
records.races_best_for: Large race. Night vision. Good melee classes.

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.why_its_good: Befallen 15-25 (ZEM 160!) or Unrest
records.tips: Universal path from 30+
records.races_best_for: Ultravision. Good caster classes. Evil faction everywhere.

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.why_its_good: Unrest 15-25 then Upper Guk 25-30
records.tips: Universal path from 30+
records.races_best_for: Infravision. Good melee/cleric. Faydwer start is strong.

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.why_its_good: Warrens 15-25 (ZEM 150!) or Unrest (boat)
records.tips: Universal path from 25-30+
records.races_best_for: INT casters. Odus is isolated - leave early for better options.

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.why_its_good: Unrest 15-25 then Upper Guk 25-30
records.tips: Universal path from 30+
records.races_best_for: Infravision. Small size. Good caster/rogue. Faydwer path.

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.play_style: Depends on starting city choice - see Freeport/Qeynos/Faydwer sections
records.why_its_good: Follow the path of your starting city
records.tips: Universal path from 25-30+
records.races_best_for: Flexible starting location. Choose Faydwer for best early path.

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.why_its_good: Unrest 15-25 (travel to Faydwer) or High Keep
records.tips: Universal path from 30+

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.why_its_good: Unrest 15-25 then Upper Guk 25-30
records.tips: Universal path from 30+
records.races_best_for: Best INT. Good caster classes. Faydwer path.

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.why_its_good: Follow your starting city's path
records.tips: Universal path from 25-30+
records.races_best_for: Most versatile race. Choose city based on class.

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.play_style: Field of Bone 1-10 then Kurn's Tower 8-17
records.why_its_good: Lake of Ill Omen / Dalnir 17-30
records.tips: Old Sebilis path from 35+. See Kunark section.
records.races_best_for: Regen bonus. Best monk/SK/necro race. Kunark is self-contained.

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.play_style: Feerrott 1-10 then travel to Commonlands/North Ro
records.why_its_good: Befallen/Upper Guk 15-25 or travel to Kunark
records.tips: Universal path from 30+
records.races_best_for: Slam ability. Frontal stun immunity. Evil faction. Large size.

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.play_style: Innothule 1-10 then Upper Guk (ZEM 150!) right next door
records.why_its_good: Upper Guk / Befallen 15-25 or travel to Kunark
records.tips: Universal path from 30+
records.races_best_for: Regen bonus. Upper Guk is RIGHT THERE from Innothule.

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.play_style: Shar Vahl Pit 1-5 then Shadeweaver's 5-10 then Paludal 10+
records.why_its_good: Paludal Caverns 10-25 (ZEM 160!)
records.tips: Dawnshroud/Echo Caverns then universal path
records.races_best_for: Cat race. Luclin only. Paludal Caverns is OP for leveling.

records.section: QUICK REFERENCE — RACE TO STARTING PATH MAPPING
records.why_its_good: Unrest 15-25 then Upper Guk 25-30
records.tips: Universal path from 30+
records.races_best_for: Infravision. Good ranger/druid/bard. Watch for falling off Kelethin!
